# Bluetooth Mouse Jiggler APK

Download the Bluetooth Mouse Jiggler APK, an Android Bluetooth HID utility for paired-device mouse movement and wakefulness testing.

Download: https://tanzir71.github.io/android-apk-landing-pages/bluetooth-mouse-jiggler/assets/bluetooth-mouse-jiggler.apk
Canonical: https://tanzir71.github.io/android-apk-landing-pages/bluetooth-mouse-jiggler/
Author: Tanzir Rahman, https://tanziro.com
Package: com.antigravity.bg_mouse_jiggler
Version: 1.0.0+1
APK size: 45.28 MB
SHA256: a5692bd2039de4a0296b7bf7a00915d37d2e9bf32abd3f40d2aa22fb9df9c056

Important: This APK is vibe-coded, has limited testing, and ships with no warranty. Users should read the permissions and install at their own risk.
